0.q: Co-expression of the CYP710A157 gene with the BpY gene (encoding β-amyrin synthase) in tobacco significantly enhanced the catalytic efficiency of echinocystic acid (EA) compared to the control, by achieving 10.22-fold increases.

1.q: Overexpression of CYP710A157 and CYP71D752 in Saccharomyces cerevisiae JWy602 yielded EA and BT at 3.25 mg l−1 and 13.84 mg l−1, respectively, whereas no product accumulation was detected in the control.
